APPLEACCOUNTTRANSPARENCYD(8) System Manager's Manual APPLEACCOUNTTRANSPARENCYD(8)

NAME

appleaccounttransparencyd — Apple Account daemon

SYNOPSIS

appleaccounttransparencyd

DESCRIPTION

The appleaccounttransparencyd daemon provides Apple Account services and serves XPC clients via the com.apple.appleaccount.transparency Mach service.

appleaccounttransparencyd is launched on-demand by launchd(8). It must not be invoked directly by users or processes; all interaction must occur through the designated XPC service name.

SEE ALSO

appleaccountd(8), launchd(8), launchd.plist(5)

March 18, 2026 macOS 26
